name: Easy Kolache
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and cinnamon.
2. In a saucepan, heat the milk, butter, sugar, and salt until warm.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the saucepan; stir in the eggs and lemon rind.
4. Beat at low speed for one minute, then increase to high speed and beat an additional 3 minutes.
5. Stir in 1 1/2 to 2 1/4 cups of flour by hand until a smooth dough forms.
6. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth.
7. Shape into a ball and place in a greased bowl. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
8. Punch down the dough and divide it in half. Cover each portion and let rest for 10 minutes.
9. Shape each half into nine balls.
10. Place the balls on a greased baking sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
11. Flatten each ball to a 3 1/2 inch circle.
12. Let rise until doubled, about 45 minutes.
13. Make a depression in the center of each kolache and fill with filling.
14. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes.
